speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Fear it not, sir. I would I were so sure

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To win the King as I am bold her honor

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Will remain hers.

speaker: PHILARIO
text: What means do you make to him?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Not any, but abide the change of time,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Quake in the present winter’s state, and wish

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: That warmer days would come. In these feared hopes

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I barely gratify your love; they failing,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I must die much your debtor.

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Your very goodness and your company

speaker: PHILARIO
text: O’erpays all I can do. By this, your king

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Hath heard of great Augustus. Caius Lucius

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Will do ’s commission throughly. And I think

speaker: PHILARIO
text: He’ll grant the tribute, send th’ arrearages,

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Or look upon our Romans, whose remembrance

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Is yet fresh in their grief.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I do believe,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Statist though I am none nor like to be,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: That this will prove a war; and you shall hear

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The legion now in Gallia sooner landed

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: In our not-fearing Britain than have tidings

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Of any penny tribute paid. Our countrymen

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Are men more ordered than when Julius Caesar

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Smiled at their lack of skill but found their courage

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Worthy his frowning at. Their discipline,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Now wingèd with their courages, will make known

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To their approvers they are people such

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: That mend upon the world.

speaker: PHILARIO
text: See, Iachimo!

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The swiftest harts have posted you by land,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And winds of all the corners kissed your sails

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To make your vessel nimble.

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Welcome, sir.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I hope the briefness of your answer made

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The speediness of your return.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Your lady

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Is one of the fairest that I have looked upon.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And therewithal the best, or let her beauty

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Look thorough a casement to allure false hearts

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And be false with them.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Here are letters for you.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Their tenor good, I trust.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: ’Tis very like.

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Was Caius Lucius in the Briton court

speaker: PHILARIO
text: When you were there?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: He was expected then, but not approached.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: All is well yet.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Sparkles this stone as it was wont, or is ’t not

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Too dull for your good wearing?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: If I have lost it,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I should have lost the worth of it in gold.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I’ll make a journey twice as far t’ enjoy

speaker: IACHIMO
text: A second night of such sweet shortness which

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Was mine in Britain, for the ring is won.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The stone’s too hard to come by.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Not a whit,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Your lady being so easy.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Make not, sir,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Your loss your sport. I hope you know that we

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Must not continue friends.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Good sir, we must,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: If you keep covenant. Had I not brought

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The knowledge of your mistress home, I grant

speaker: IACHIMO
text: We were to question farther; but I now

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Profess myself the winner of her honor,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Together with your ring, and not the wronger

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Of her or you, having proceeded but

speaker: IACHIMO
text: By both your wills.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: If you can make ’t apparent

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: That you have tasted her in bed, my hand

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And ring is yours. If not, the foul opinion

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: You had of her pure honor gains or loses

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Your sword or mine, or masterless leave both

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To who shall find them.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Sir, my circumstances,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Being so near the truth as I will make them,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Must first induce you to believe; whose strength

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I will confirm with oath, which I doubt not

speaker: IACHIMO
text: You’ll give me leave to spare when you shall find

speaker: IACHIMO
text: You need it not.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Proceed.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: First, her bedchamber—

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Where I confess I slept not, but profess

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Had that was well worth watching—it was hanged

speaker: IACHIMO
text: With tapestry of silk and silver, the story

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Proud Cleopatra when she met her Roman

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And Cydnus swelled above the banks, or for

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The press of boats or pride. A piece of work

speaker: IACHIMO
text: So bravely done, so rich, that it did strive

speaker: IACHIMO
text: In workmanship and value, which I wondered

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Could be so rarely and exactly wrought

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Since the true life on ’t was—

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: This is true,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And this you might have heard of here, by me

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Or by some other.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: More particulars

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Must justify my knowledge.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: So they must,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Or do your honor injury.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The chimney

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Is south the chamber, and the chimney-piece

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Chaste Dian bathing. Never saw I figures

speaker: IACHIMO
text: So likely to report themselves; the cutter

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Was as another Nature, dumb, outwent her,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Motion and breath left out.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: This is a thing

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Which you might from relation likewise reap,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Being, as it is, much spoke of.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: The roof o’ th’ chamber

speaker: IACHIMO
text: With golden cherubins is fretted. Her andirons—

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I had forgot them—were two winking Cupids

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Of silver, each on one foot standing, nicely

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Depending on their brands.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: This is her honor?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Let it be granted you have seen all this—and praise

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Be given to your remembrance—the description

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Of what is in her chamber nothing saves

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The wager you have laid.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Then if you can

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Be pale, I beg but leave to air this jewel. See—

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And now ’tis up again. It must be married

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To that your diamond. I’ll keep them.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Jove!

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Once more let me behold it. Is it that

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Which I left with her?

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Sir, I thank her, that.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: She stripped it from her arm. I see her yet.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Her pretty action did outsell her gift

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And yet enriched it too. She gave it me

speaker: IACHIMO
text: And said she prized it once.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Maybe she plucked it off

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: To send it me.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: She writes so to you, doth she?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: O, no, no, no, ’tis true. Here, take this too.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: It is a basilisk unto mine eye,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Kills me to look on ’t. Let there be no honor

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Where there is beauty, truth where semblance, love

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Where there’s another man. The vows of women

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Of no more bondage be to where they are made

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Than they are to their virtues, which is nothing.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: O, above measure false!

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Have patience, sir,

speaker: PHILARIO
text: And take your ring again. ’Tis not yet won.

speaker: PHILARIO
text: It may be probable she lost it; or

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Who knows if one her women, being corrupted,

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Hath stol’n it from her.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Very true,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And so I hope he came by ’t.—Back, my ring!

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Render to me some corporal sign about her

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: More evident than this, for this was stol’n.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: By Jupiter, I had it from her arm.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Hark you, he swears! By Jupiter he swears.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: ’Tis true—nay, keep the ring—’tis true.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I am sure

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: She would not lose it. Her attendants are

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: All sworn and honorable. They induced to steal it?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And by a stranger? No, he hath enjoyed her.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: The cognizance of her incontinency

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Is this. She hath bought the name of whore thus dearly.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: There, take thy hire, and all the fiends of hell

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Divide themselves between you!

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Sir, be patient.

speaker: PHILARIO
text: This is not strong enough to be believed

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Of one persuaded well of.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Never talk on ’t.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: She hath been colted by him.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: If you seek

speaker: IACHIMO
text: For further satisfying, under her breast,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Worthy the pressing, lies a mole, right proud

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Of that most delicate lodging. By my life,

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I kissed it, and it gave me present hunger

speaker: IACHIMO
text: To feed again, though full. You do remember

speaker: IACHIMO
text: This stain upon her?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Ay, and it doth confirm

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Another stain as big as hell can hold,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Were there no more but it.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: Will you hear more?

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Spare your arithmetic;

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Never count the turns. Once, and a million!

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I’ll be sworn—

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: No swearing.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: If you will swear you have not done ’t, you lie,

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: And I will kill thee if thou dost deny

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Thou ’st made me cuckold.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: I’ll deny nothing.

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: O, that I had her here, to tear her limb-meal!

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: I will go there and do ’t i’ th’ court, before

speaker: POSTHUMUS
text: Her father. I’ll do something.

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Quite beside

speaker: PHILARIO
text: The government of patience. You have won.

speaker: PHILARIO
text: Let’s follow him and pervert the present wrath

speaker: PHILARIO
text: He hath against himself.

speaker: IACHIMO
text: With all my heart.
